posts.text:
> Cops quit on mass the month before 

> Safest January ever recorded

It’s like there’s some sort of correlation here


FactPost (@factpostnews)

New analysis reveals New York City just had its safest January on record.

Homicides plunged 60 percent, and shooting incidents dropped by 20 percent compared to January 2025.





— https://nitter.net/factpostnews/status/2019096447883350373#m
